description: User-reported answer failures that must retain a reviewed final-answer snapshot. Add a case here whenever a real user report exposes an answer-level regression.

required_cases.reason: User report: a late forecourt-reception question returned no core video and cited backhand passive-clear evidence.
User report: symptom wording for kill-to-net had to remain equivalent to the instructional wording.
User report: an opponent response inserted into a kill-to-net sequence caused generic smash and late-contact evidence to replace the named sequence.
